name: Clap Your Hands Hallelujah
chorusText:
Clap your hands Hallelujah
Clap your hands Hallelujah
Clap your hands Hallelujah
In the Name of the Lord
Shout it Hallelujah
Shout it Hallelujah
Shout it Hallelujah
In the Name of the Lord
Jump with joy Hallelujah
Jump with joy Hallelujah
Jump with joy Hallelujah
In the Name of the Lord
Praise the Lord Hallelujah
Praise the Lord Hallelujah
Praise the Lord Hallelujah
In the Name of the Lord
